reasoning: ch is allocated via malloc() at L29 then ch->ifname is accessed at L30. If malloc returns NULL, this is a null dereference. No // ERROR at L30 (the // ERROR is at L43 for a different bug), so this is new. PC = (STRICT_ANSI OR !STRICT_ANSI) = true, tautological — no real feature flag constraint, correctly captures that the bug exists in all configs.
